results.title: AAA: Summer’s ‘100 deadliest days’ bring spike in fatal teen-driver crashes
results.description: PORTLAND, Ore. -- Memorial Day marks the start of the summer driving season, and AAA finds that the 100 days between Memorial Day and Labor Day are the “100 deadliest days,” when fatal crashes involving teen drivers spike. To encourage safer choices during this high-travel period, AAA is urging drivers to commit to “100 Days The post AAA: Summer’s ‘100 deadliest days’ bring spike in fatal teen-driver crashes appeared first on KTVZ .

results.title: Medieval-inspired aparthotel to open In York
results.description: A new hospitality venture is set to welcome guests this month after blending modern accommodation with architectural inspiration drawn from the York’s rich medieval heritage. A new 46-suite aparthotel on Micklegate is opening following a regeneration project that combines contemporary design with York’s historic character. results.title: Bengaluru: Realtor alleges blackmail by live-in partner
results.description: Extortion case: A Bengaluru realtor accused his live-in partner and her husband of blackmail, alleging threats to leak private photographs and demands for money. Police registered a case and launched an investigation.

results.title: GOP candidate focused on Mideast peace threatens California Democrats’ House redistricting goal
results.description: Michael Stansfield, a 50-year-old tech support worker, decided to run as a Republican in his congressional district in suburban Sacramento, California, to make a statement to the party's religious base.
